description_long: This wheelchair features a sturdy metal frame with a matte black finish, supporting a taut, dark fabric seat and backrest. The large rear wheels are spoked and fitted with push rims, while the smaller front caster wheels provide maneuverability. The armrests are straight and parallel to the seat, and the footrests are fixed, extending forward with a simple, flat design. The push handles at the back are standard, straight, and capped with rubber grips for comfort. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and ease of use in urban environments. The wheelchair's proportions and construction suggest it is suitable for adult users and can be easily pushed or self-propelled.
description: A robust, matte black wheelchair with spoked rear wheels, push rims, fixed footrests, and a taut fabric seat and backrest. Designed for durability and ease of use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, straight armrests, and fixed footrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large spoked rear wheel, push rim, and the straight push handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest, both push handles, and the symmetry of the rear wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the spoked wheel, push rim, and footrest configuration.
attribute_wheel_type: Spoked rear wheels with push rims, two large wheels at the back and two smaller solid caster wheels at the front.
attribute_frame_design: Rigid frame with straight tubing and no visible folding mechanism; features simple cross-bracing for stability.
attribute_footrest_style: Fixed footrests, flat and rectangular, extending forward from the frame.
attribute_handlebar_configuration: Standard straight push handles with rubber grips, positioned at the top rear of the backrest.
